body: import java.nio.charset.Charset;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.util.Arrays;
import org.apache.commons.codec.DecoderException;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.codec.CodecPolicy;
import static org.junit.Assert.fail;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertNull;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertArrayEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertFalse;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertNotNull;

translation: self.assertEqual("empty Base32 encode with offset", 0, len(result))
self.assertIsNone("empty Base32 encode with offset", Base32.Base320().encode0(None))
self.fail("Should have rejected null line separator")
self.fail("Should have rejected attempt to use 'A' as a line separator")
self.fail("Should have rejected attempt to use '=' as a line separator")
self.fail("Should have rejected attempt to use 'A$' as a line separator")
self.fail("Should have rejected attempt to use 'A' as padding")
self.fail("Should have rejected attempt to use ' ' as padding")
codec = Base32.Base322(True, ord('W'))  # should be allowed
codec = Base32(0, None, False, BaseNCodec.PAD_DEFAULT, CodecPolicy.STRICT)
invalid = length == 1 or length == 3 or length == 6
assert False, "Final base-32 digit should not be allowed"
assert bits_encoded == decoded[-1], "Invalid decoding of last character"

body:
private static final String[][] BASE32_PAD_TEST_CASES = { // RFC 4648
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "MY%%%%%%"},
        {"fo", "MZXQ%%%%"},
        {"foo", "MZXW6%%%"},
        {"foob", "MZXW6YQ%"},
        {"fooba", "MZXW6YTB"},
        {"foobar", "MZXW6YTBOI%%%%%%"},
    };

private static final String[][] BASE32_TEST_CASES_CHUNKED = { // Chunked
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "MY======\r\n"},
        {"fo", "MZXQ====\r\n"},
        {"foo", "MZXW6===\r\n"},
        {"foob", "MZXW6YQ=\r\n"},
        {"fooba", "MZXW6YTB\r\n"},
        {"foobar", "MZXW6YTBOI======\r\n"},
    };

private static final String[][] BASE32HEX_TEST_CASES = { // RFC 4648
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "CO======"},
        {"fo", "CPNG===="},
        {"foo", "CPNMU==="},
        {"foob", "CPNMUOG="},
        {"fooba", "CPNMUOJ1"},
        {"foobar", "CPNMUOJ1E8======"},
    };
private static final Object[][] BASE32_BINARY_TEST_CASES;
